withdraw.title: Janye daga gasa
withdraw.successWithRefund: An janye ka daga gasar. An ƙirƙira buƙatar maido da kuɗi kuma mai tsarawa zai sarrafa shi.
withdraw.success: An janye ka daga gasar cikin nasara.

caddiePending.title: Shawarwarin da ke jiran amsa
caddiePending.subtitle: Duba kowane zaɓi na AI Caddie kuma yi alama akan sandar da kuka buga da gaske.
caddiePending.errorAiOff: An kashe AI Caddie don asusunku. Sake kunna izinin AI a Sirri don amfani da wannan shafin.
caddiePending.errorLoad: Ba a iya loda shawarwarinku da ke jira ba.
caddiePending.emptyText: Babu shawarwarin da ke jiran ra'ayinku.
caddiePending.saveErrorDefault: Da fatan za a sake gwadawa nan da kaɗan.
caddiePending.saveErrorNetwork: Da fatan duba haɗin ku kuma sake gwadawa.
caddiePending.invalidDistanceMsg: Tazara zuwa fil ya kamata ya zama lamba tsakanin 0 da 400 yards. Danna Tsallake don ajiyewa ba tare da shi ba.
caddiePending.outcomeHint: Na zaɓi — tazara zuwa fil bayan harbinku, a yards. Yana taimaka wa AI Caddie ya koyi da sauri.
caddiePending.noRecommendation: AI bai sami isasshen bayanai don ba da shawarar sanda ba.

badges.shareProgressA11y: Raba ci gaba na lambar yabo ta {{label}}

badges.progressTitle: Ci gaban ku na lambobin yabo
badges.signInToView: Shiga don ka ga lambobin yabo naka.

commPrefs.intro: Zaɓi yadda kulobinku zai iya tuntuɓar ku game da kowane batun. Kuna iya cire kanku daga tallace-tallace gaba ɗaya yayin da kuke ci gaba da samun sabuntawar sabis.
commPrefs.whatsappFootnote: Saƙonnin WhatsApp ana tura su ne daga tabbatacciyar lambar WhatsApp Business ta kulob — dokokin daidai na MSG91 sun shafi.

billing.label: Lissafin kuɗi
billing.description: Takardun lissafi, bayanai da rasidan biyan kuɗi.

operations.label: Ayyuka
operations.description: Rufewar filin wasa, yanayi da gargaɗin aiki.

service.label: Sabis
service.description: Tabbatar da rajista da sabuntawar sabis.

events.label: Abubuwa
events.description: Abubuwan membobi da sanarwar cin abinci.

tournaments.label: Gasasshe
tournaments.description: Gayyatar gasa, jefa kuri'a da sakamako.

newsletters.label: Wasiƙun labarai
newsletters.description: Wasiƙun labarai na lokaci-lokaci daga kulobinku.

marketing.label: Tallace-tallace
marketing.description: Tallace-tallace da kuma tayin abokin haɗin gwiwa.

social.label: Zamantakewa
social.description: Ayyukan zamantakewa na membobi (sha'awa, sharhi, ambato).

privacy.label: Sirri da na shari'a
privacy.description: Sanarwar tilas don kāriyar bayanai (misali, neman sirri). Cikin manhaja da imel kullum suna kunne; zaɓi ko kuna son samun tura da SMS kuma.

emailOptOuts.sectionTitle: Cire ɓarna ta imel ga kowane taron
emailOptOuts.sectionDescription: Daidaita imel-imel ɗaiɗai na ma'amala ba tare da kashe duka rukunin biyan kuɗi ba.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLabel: Aiko mini imel lokacin da fitarwar bayanai ke gab da ƙarewa
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringDesc: Imel na tunatarwa kwanaki kaɗan kafin haɗin saukar fitarwar bayanai ya daina aiki.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLinkChangeHint: An canza shi a ƙarshe ta hanyar mahaɗin imel a ranar {{date}} ({{direction}})
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsLabel: Rasidan biyan kuɗi na wasannin gefe
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsDesc: Rasidan ta imel lokacin da wani ɗan wasa ya biya cin amana na wasan gefe na yau da kullun tare da kai.
emailOptOuts.manualEntryLabel: Faɗakarwar ingancin bayanan da aka shigar da hannu
emailOptOuts.manualEntryDesc: Tura da imel lokacin da zagayowar gasa ta rufe wadda aka shigar da yawanci da hannu. Daraktoci na gasa da membobin kwamiti ne kawai ke iya gani.
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutLabel: Faɗakarwar canjin asusun biyan kuɗi na koci
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutDesc: Imel lokacin da aka ƙirƙira ko sabunta asusun biyan kuɗi na koci, ana aikawa ga masu kula da kungiya a matsayin sigina na tsaro.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyLabel: Sanarwar sake-tabbatar da biyan kuɗi ta admin
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyDesc: Imel idan mai gudanarwar ƙungiya ya sake-tabbatar da asusun biyan kuɗinka da hannu. Mai zaman kanta daga babban kashewar Billing a ƙasa — kashe wannan kawai yana shiru da sanarwar ladabi ta admin kuma ya bar rasidun biyan kuɗi da imel ɗin cron na 'yana buƙatar kulawa' ba a taɓa su ba.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyTipBody: Masu horarwa: wannan saƙon ladabi daga admin yanzu yana da maɓallin kansa. Kashe waɗannan sanarwar kawai ba tare da kashe sauran imel ɗin Biyan ku ba.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestLabel: Taƙaitaccen tsaftace gogewa da ya makale
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestDesc: Imel ɗin yau da kullum ga masu kula da ke jera mambobi waɗanda gogewar asusunsu ta bar fayiloli a ma'ajiyar abubuwa.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestPushLabel: Taƙaitaccen tsaftace gogewa da ya makale — cikin app / turawa
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestPushDesc: Sanarwar cikin app da sanarwar turawa na yau da kullum ga masu kula da ke jera mambobi waɗanda gogewar asusunsu ta bar fayiloli a ma'ajiyar abubuwa. Ba ya da alaƙa da maɓallin imel ɗin da ke sama — yi shiru a hanya ɗaya ba tare da shafar ɗaya ba.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageStatusBothMuted: Duka biyu sun yi shiru — sanarwa za su bayyana ne kawai a cikin log ɗin bincike
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageBothMutedHint: Lura: haɓaka matakin ƙungiya har yanzu yana dogara da aƙalla tashar da ke isa gare ka. Tare da duka biyu sun yi shiru, za ka ga sabbin sanarwar share da aka makale ne kawai idan ka buɗe log ɗin bincike.

keyPrefs.sectionTitle: Kowane sanarwa: lokaci na ainihi vs. taƙaitaccen yau da kullum
keyPrefs.sectionDescription: Zaɓi yadda kowane sanarwar da za a iya tarawa zai zo gareku. Lokaci na ainihi yana aikawa nan take; Taƙaitaccen yau da kullum yana riƙe shi har zuwa imel ɗin taƙaitawa na gaba.
keyPrefs.digestModePrefix: Saitin taƙaitawar duniya naka a halin yanzu
keyPrefs.digestModeSuffix: . Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke ƙasa suna shafe shi don sanarwa ɗaya-ɗaya.
keyPrefs.realtimeNotSelected: Lokaci na ainihi, ba a zaɓa ba
keyPrefs.dailySummarySelected: Taƙaitaccen yau da kullum, an zaɓa
keyPrefs.dailySummaryNotSelected: Taƙaitaccen yau da kullum, ba a zaɓa ba

walletPayoutNeedsReverify.body: Sabuwar tantancewar mu ta yau da kullum game da bayanan biyan kuɗin da ka adana ba ta yi nasara ba, don haka an dakatar da janyewar kuɗi har sai ka sake adana su.
